samples.text: All birds can fly. A sparrow is a bird. Can the sparrow fly?
Every bird is capable of flight. A sparrow belongs to the bird category. Is the sparrow able to fly?
Birds are animals that can fly. A sparrow is classified as a bird. Can a sparrow fly?
All avians can fly. A sparrow is an avian. Can the sparrow fly?
Sparrows are birds. Birds can fly. Therefore, can sparrows fly?
All birds can fly. Apples are usually red. A sparrow is a bird. Can the sparrow fly?
